commit_scope: Repair the native BML contributors page query after public release exposed native headers with an empty page despite total=169.

commands: cd form/form-kernel-rust && git show origin/main:deploy/front-door/api.bml > /tmp/origin-main-repair-api.bml && ./target/release/form-kernel-rust check --routes /tmp/origin-main-repair-api.bml --stdlib ../form-stdlib
local_validation.summary: The BML stable UUID fallback now casts UUID ids to text before md5, matching Postgres md5(text). Public and Hostinger deploy verification now fail when contributors has total > 0 but no object rows.

observed_delta.public_regression_before_repair: After PR #2732 deployed, GET /api/contributors?limit=5&offset=0 returned HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_contributors, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, total=169, limit=5, offset=0, but items=[].
observed_delta.root_cause_inference: The count query succeeded while the page query returned no rows. The page query used md5(id) in the fallback UUID expression; graph_nodes.id is UUID-typed in production and Postgres md5 requires text, so the fallback expression needs id::text.
observed_delta.guard_delta: scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh now requires contributors to return either total=0/items=[] or total>0 with at least one object row. deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh now requires the contributors canary body to include an object row.

known_limitations.observed: form-kernel-rust check --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml reports the same 14 unresolved full-catalog names on origin/main and on this branch. The repair adds no new checker debt.
The local worktree has no running local Postgres socket. The decisive proof for this repair is the strengthened Hostinger canary plus post-deploy public curl.

deploy_validation.notes: Post-merge deploy must show native headers and contributors items[0] as an object when total remains nonzero.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native contributors route returns actual contributor row objects, not only a count.
test_flows: Repair the UUID fallback SQL expression.
Strengthen deploy verification so the same regression cannot pass again.

phase_gate.reason: Local repair proof is complete. PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before claiming the repair released.
